name: Winter Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and prepare all vegetables for the food processor or hand shredder.
2. Shred all vegetables and transfer to a 5-gallon pot. Mix thoroughly and cover with ½ cup pickling salt. Leave on the counter overnight to ferment (important step).
3. The next day, bring brine ingredients to a boil, stirring occasionally until well mixed. Add cabbage mixture and return to a boil. Cook for 15 minutes.
4. Prepare 15 jars for canning by boiling lids and rings for 5 minutes. Alternatively, microwave jars with water for 5 minutes (10 at a time).
5. After cooking the cabbage mixture for 15 minutes, turn off heat and pack the mixture into hot jars. Fill with brine and use the end of a wooden spoon to remove air bubbles and seal.
6. Allow jars to cool on a dry dishcloth until sealed (they will pop). Store in a cold, dark place until ready to use.
7. Before serving, refrigerate a jar overnight for best results.
